The pen is mightier than sword. The pen is mightier than war. The pen is mightier than peace.

*highlighted section*

The function processes each produce item. It checks the days since harvest. It returns the freshness status.

* * *

The input is a list of tuples. Each tuple has a name and days. The output is a list of strings.

The days determine the freshness. The criteria are clear. The output matches the input order.

The pen is mightier than thought. The pen is mightier than code. The pen is mightier than word.
